diffs.patch:
Index: bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md
===================================================================
--- bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
+++ bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md	
@@ -0,0 +1,153 @@
+# Routing Read/Write Ledger
+
+## src/hono.ts
+
+- Purpose: Main Hono class entry point that extends HonoBase and configures default router
+- Names noticed: Hono, HonoBase, RegExpRouter, SmartRouter, TrieRouter, BlankEnv, BlankSchema, Env, Schema, HonoOptions
+- Simple note: 34 lines, constructor sets SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter as fallbacks
+
+## src/hono-base.ts
+
+- Purpose: Base class for Hono with routing, middleware, error handling, and request dispatch logic
+- Names noticed: HonoBase, Context, Router, METHODS, GetPath, NotFoundHandler, ErrorHandler, OnHandlerInterface, MiddlewareHandlerInterface, RouterRoute, mergePath, getPath, compose
+- Simple note: 545 lines, implements route registration via get/post/put/delete/patch/all/on/use
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module export file for PatternRouter
+- Names noticed: PatternRouter
+- Simple note: 6 lines, re-exports router implementation
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Router that converts path patterns to RegExp for efficient matching
+- Names noticed: Params, Result, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, Route, emptyParams, PatternRouter, RegExp, exec, match, replace, push
+- Simple note: 60 lines, transforms :param syntax to regex during add, matches all routes on match
+
+## src/router/linear-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module export file for LinearRouter
+- Names noticed: LinearRouter
+- Simple note: 6 lines, re-exports router implementation
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Sequential linear router that checks routes in order
+- Names noticed: Params, Result, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, ROUTES_LOOP, LinearRouter, RegExpMatchArrayWithIndices, splitPathRe, splitByStarRe, indexOf, match, exec, push, split
+- Simple note: 144 lines, loops through all routes sequentially, supports :param and * wildcards
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module export file for RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter
+- Names noticed: RegExpRouter, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams
+- Simple note: 7 lines, exports router and prepared router variant for serialization
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Main RegExpRouter implementation using TriEs to build efficient RegEx patterns
+- Names noticed: ParamIndexMap, Router, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, METHOD_NAME_ALL, UnsupportedPathError, checkOptionalParameter, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, Trie, HandlerWithMetadata, nullMatcher, wildcardRegExpCache, buildWildcardRegExp, clearWildcardRegExpCache, buildMatcherFromPreprocessedRoutes, findMiddleware, RegExpRouter, buildAllMatchers, RegExpRouter, match, emptyParam, insert, buildRegExp, Object.create
+- Simple note: 252 lines, builds trie, converts to regex, caches wildcards, throws on ambiguous patterns
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts
+
+- Purpose: Core matching function used by RegExpRouter and PreparedRegExpRouter
+- Names noticed: ParamIndexMap, Result, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, HandlerData, StaticMap, Matcher, MatcherMap, match, emptyParam, buildAllMatchers, exec, indexOf
+- Simple note: 33 lines, returns matcher cache, matches against regex or static map
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Pre-compiled router for performance-critical environments
+- Names noticed: ParamIndexMap, Result, Router, METHOD_NAME_ALL, HandlerData, Matcher, RelocateMap, PreparedRegExpRouter, buildInitParams, serializeInitParams, insert, forEach, forEach, push, map, JSON.stringify, toString
+- Simple note: 165 lines, pre-builds matchers from known paths, supports wildcard registration dynamically
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts
+
+- Purpose: Trie node implementation for pattern-based routing
+- Names noticed: PATH_ERROR, ParamAssocArray, Node, varIndex, children, insert, buildRegExpStr, sort, match, replace, indexOf, test, Object.create
+- Simple note: 162 lines, recursive trie structure, supports labels and wildcards, returns regex string
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts
+
+- Purpose: Trie data structure forRegExpRouter path indexing
+- Names noticed: ParamAssocArray, Context, Node, ReplacementMap, Trie, varIndex, groups, tokens, match, replace, insert, buildRegExp, exec, match, indexOf, join, split
+- Simple note: 74 lines, processes path groups into tokens, builds replacement maps for parameter substitution
+
+## src/router/smart-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module export file for SmartRouter
+- Names noticed: SmartRouter
+- Simple note: 6 lines, re-exports router implementation
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Router delegate that tries multiple routers and picks the first successful match
+- Names noticed: Result, Router, MESSAGE_MATCHER_IS_ALREADY_BUILT, UnsupportedPathError, SmartRouter, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, buildAllMatchers, activeRouter, forEach, try, catch, bind, push, length
+- Simple note: 70 lines, wraps array of routers, selects best router after match, exposes activeRouter getter
+
+## src/router/trie-router/index.ts
+
+- Purpose: Module export file for TrieRouter
+- Names noticed: TrieRouter
+- Simple note: 6 lines, re-exports router implementation
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.ts
+
+- Purpose: Trie-based router for hierarchical path matching
+- Names noticed: Result, Router, checkOptionalParameter, Node, insert, search, TrieRouter, Object.create
+- Simple note: 28 lines, inserts to tree, searches path, returns all matching handlers
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.ts
+
+- Purpose: Trie node for method-based path matching
+- Names noticed: Params, METHOD_NAME_ALL, Pattern, getPattern, splitPath, splitRoutingPath, HandlerSet, HandlerParamsSet, possibleKeys, score, children, methods, patterns, order, params, search, insert, forEach, push, map, Object.create, filter, indexOf, test
+- Simple note: 234 lines, tree walk with pattern matching, supports all methods, returns sorted handler sets
+
+## src/router/common.case.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Shared test suite for all router implementations
+- Names noticed: RunnerTestSuite, ParamIndexMap, Params, Router, describe, it, expect, beforeEach, skip, runTest, task, suite, join
+- Simple note: 882 lines, 36+ test scenarios covering basic usage, reserved words, complex patterns, multi-match, duplicates, optional routes, star wildcards, trailing slashes, hostname routing
+
+## src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Tests for PatternRouter with common cases and edge tests
+- Names notices: UnsupportedPathError, runTest, PatternRouter, describe, it, expect, runTest, throwError, toBeNull
+- Simple note: 42 lines, imports common tests, skips UnsupportedPathError and trailing slash tests, adds trailing slash verification
+
+## src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Tests for LinearRouter with common cases and edge tests
+- Names noticed: UnsupportedPathError, runTest, LinearRouter, describe, it, expect, runTest, throwError, toBeNull
+- Simple note: 69 lines, imports common tests, skips UnsupportedPath tests for complex patterns and trailing slash, adds skip part test
+
+## src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Tests for RegExpRouter with common cases and ambiguity tests
+- Names noticed: ParamStash, UnsupportedPathError, runTest, RegExpRouter, describe, it, expect, runTest, throwError, toBeNull
+- Simple note: 141 lines, imports common tests, skips Duplicate param name and ambiguous patterns, adds Return value type and UnsupportedPathError descriptions
+
+## src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Tests for SmartRouter using RegExpRouter and TrieRouter combination
+- Names noticed: runTest, RegExpRouter, TrieRouter, SmartRouter, describe, it, expect, newRouter, constructor, routers
+- Simple note: 13 lines, wraps common tests, configures SmartRouter with RegExpRouter and TrieRouter array
+
+## src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Tests for TrieRouter with common cases
+- Names notices: runTest, TrieRouter, describe, it, expect, newRouter
+- Simple note: 8 lines, imports common tests, instantiates and runs full test suite
+
+## src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts
+
+- Purpose: Unit tests for TrieRouter node implementation
+- Names noticed: Node, describe, it, expect, search, insert, insert, toBeNull, filter, indexOf, test
+- Simple note: 816 lines, 20+ test cases for root node, named paths, wildcards, regexps, multi-match, sort order, fallback, routing order, and special cases
+
+## Cross-File Checklist
+
+- pattern-router: src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts
+- linear-router: src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts
+- reg-exp-router: src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts
+- smart-router: src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts
+- trie-router: src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts

parts.text:
"Benchmark task: routing-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md. This is a read/write endurance task, not a clever debugging task. First create the bench-artifacts directory if it does not exist. Then read every file in this exact list before writing the final document: src/hono.ts, src/hono-base.ts, src/router/pattern-router/index.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.ts, src/router/linear-router/index.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/index.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/matcher.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/prepared-router.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/node.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/trie.ts, src/router/smart-router/index.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/index.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.ts, src/router/common.case.test.ts, src/router/pattern-router/router.test.ts, src/router/linear-router/router.test.ts, src/router/reg-exp-router/router.test.ts, src/router/smart-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/router.test.ts, src/router/trie-router/node.test.ts. The output file must be long but mechanically simple. Start with a title '# Routing Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a section whose heading is exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write three bullets: '- Purpose: ...', '- Names noticed: ...', and '- Simple note: ...'. Keep the notes plain and safe; do not change source code. After the per-file sections, add '## Cross-File Checklist' with one bullet per router family: pattern-router, linear-router, reg-exp-router, smart-router, trie-router. Include exact file paths in the final answer and report that only bench-artifacts/routing-read-write-ledger.md was created.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."

This is a read/write endurance task where I need to:
1. Create the bench-artifacts directory
2. Read all the specified files from the Hono repository
3. Create a markdown file with specific sections for each file
4. Add a cross-file checklist for router families

Let me start by creating the directory and then reading all the files in parallel.
